title: Good Luck Potato!
description: Adds a new Realistic Potato, and some funky things with it!
body:
### Consider joining the Discord server for updates!
Adds a new potato, a very realistic potato! But that’s just the start—now you can craft a **Pocket-Sized Particle Accelerator** on its own, and then transform it into a **Realism Enhancer** that cranks every detail in your potato up to insane levels. From hyper-immersive food comes a new way to eat, **giving your game an oddly satisfying touch of reality that’s powered entirely by... potatoes.**

[Also be sure to check out the GitHub page, and leave a comment!](https://github.com/Ennismore0/Good-Luck-Potato)
